item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrical Engineer is sought for a container vessel, with a joining date of 19.07.2026 for a 3-month contract. Responsibilities include maintenance and repair of electrical equipment, administration of planned maintenance, and ensuring compliance with safety procedures. Candidates should be certified, fluent in English, and possess experience in electrical/electronic fields, with a preference for 3 years on short sea vessels. Knowledge of PLC and fault finding is beneficial.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical Engineer Job on Container Vessel at Nordvegr Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An electrician is sought for a container vessel. The joining date is July 15, 2026, with a contract duration of 4 months. The monthly salary offered is USD 6000. The vessel is flagged in Singapore and has a DWT of 8210 tons and GT of 7545 reg. tons. The main engine is a MAK 8M43 with a power of 7200 kW.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on Container Vessel at Nordvegr Ltd

item.description:
Location: UK
Description:

An Electrician is sought for a Survey Vessel operating in the UK. The role involves a 4-week contract, with travel commencing on 21/07 for joining on 22/07. Previous experience on survey vessels in this capacity is mandatory, along with required certifications including CoC, STCWs, Seafarers Medical, and DP maintenance. Candidates must hold UK nationality or have the right to work in the UK.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on Survey Vessel - UK at etpm Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Assistant Electrician is sought for a cruise ship. Responsibilities include assisting with the maintenance and repair of electrical equipment, supporting daily operations, and ensuring the safe and efficient functioning of the ship's electrical systems. Candidates should have previous electrical experience, relevant technical qualifications, and good English communication skills. Competitive salary, free accommodation and meals, and flights are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Assistant Electrician Job on MSC Cruises Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi
Description:

An electrician position is available on a dredger operating in Abu Dhabi. This role requires a qualified electrician with experience in the maritime sector. The job is based in Abu Dhabi, with specific joining dates and contract durations to be confirmed upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on Dredger in Abu Dhabi at BHN OFFSHORE SHIPPING GROUP

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Indian Marine Electricians are sought for work on dredgers operating in the UAE. This role requires a strong background in marine electrical systems. Further details regarding contract duration and joining date will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrician Job on UAE Dredger at BHN OFFSHORE SHIPPING GROUP

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A position for an Electro-Technical Officer (ETO) is available for immediate deployment on Diesel Electric Vessels. The role offers a rotation of 60 days on / 60 days off and a day rate of USD 210. Joining dates are June 10, 2026, and June 24, 2026. Applicants must have a minimum of 12 months' sea service as ETO, COC III/6, DPM certification, and experience on Diesel Electric Vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Job on Diesel Electric Vessels day rate of USD 210 at CANDINA GROUP

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electro-Technical Officer (ETO) is sought for a Diesel Electric Vessel. The position offers a day rate of $210 with a rotation of 60 days. This role is suitable for experienced maritime professionals seeking offshore opportunities.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Vacancy on Diesel Electric Vessel at CANDINA GROUP

item.description:
Location: Irish Sea
Description:

An Electrical Technical Officer (ETO) is sought for a Ro-Pax Ferry operating on the Irish Sea. This position offers a 2 weeks on / 2 weeks off rotation with an immediate start. Candidates require the right to work in the UK and basic STCW certifications. This role provides an excellent opportunity for career development and work-life balance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Junior ETO Job on Ro-Pax Ferry at Clyde Marine Recruitment

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief ETO position is available on a demanding passenger vessel. The salary offered is between USD 7,000 and 9,000. Previous cruise or passenger vessel experience is preferred, but strong attitude and dedication will also be considered. Applicants must be resilient, adaptable, and committed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief ETO Job on Passenger Vessel USD 7,000 and 9,000 at Carnival cruise lines
